actions.name: close_conversation
actions.description: Close an Intercom conversation.

adminId.description: Intercom admin identifier performing the close.

body.description: Optional closing message to append to the conversation.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for closing an Intercom conversation.

actions.name: create_contact
actions.description: Create a new Intercom contact.

externalId.description: External identifier stored on the Intercom contact.

email.description: Primary email address for the Intercom contact.

anyOf.description: Phone number for the Intercom contact.
Display name for the Intercom contact.
Avatar image URL for the Intercom contact.
UNIX timestamp when the contact signed up.
UNIX timestamp when the contact was last seen.
Intercom admin identifier.
Intercom admin identifier.
Intercom admin identifier.
Whether the contact is unsubscribed from emails.
Intercom key-value object.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating an Intercom contact. At least one of email, externalId, or role is required.

actions.name: get_admin
actions.description: Get a single Intercom admin by identifier.

anyOf.description: Intercom admin identifier.
Intercom admin identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a single Intercom admin.

actions.name: get_article
actions.description: Get a single Intercom help center article by identifier.

anyOf.description: Intercom resource identifier.
Intercom resource identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a single Intercom article.

actions.name: get_company
actions.description: Get a single Intercom company by company ID or name.
requiredScopes: Read and list users and companies

companyId.description: Company identifier defined by you in Intercom.

name.description: Company name to look up in Intercom.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a single Intercom company. Exactly one of companyId or name is required.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Get a single Intercom contact by identifier.
requiredScopes: Read and list users and companies

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a single Intercom contact.

actions.name: get_contact_by_external_id
actions.description: Get a single Intercom contact by external ID.
requiredScopes: Read and list users and companies

externalId.description: External identifier stored on the Intercom contact.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a single Intercom contact by external ID.

actions.name: get_conversation
actions.description: Get a single Intercom conversation with its conversation parts.

displayAs.description: How Intercom should render conversation message bodies in the response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a single Intercom conversation.

actions.name: get_counts
actions.description: Read Intercom workspace, conversation, or grouped counts.

type.description: Intercom count type to request, such as conversation.

count.description: Intercom count grouping to request, such as tag or segment.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading Intercom counts.

actions.name: get_current_admin
actions.description: Get the currently authorized Intercom admin and workspace metadata.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading the currently authorized Intercom admin.

actions.name: get_job_status
actions.description: Get the status of an Intercom asynchronous job.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading Intercom job status.

actions.name: get_ticket
actions.description: Get a single Intercom ticket by internal ticket identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a single Intercom ticket.

actions.name: list_admins
actions.description: List Intercom admins for the current workspace.

displayAvatar.description: Whether Intercom should include admin avatar objects in the response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Intercom admins.

admins.description: Intercom admins returned for the current workspace.

actions.name: list_articles
actions.description: List Intercom help center articles.

perPage.description: Maximum number of Intercom records to return.

startingAfter.description: Opaque Intercom cursor returned from a previous paginated response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Intercom articles.

articles.description: Intercom articles returned for the current page.

hasMore.description: Whether Intercom reported another page of results.

anyOf.description: Cursor for the next Intercom page, or null when there is no next page.
Current page number reported by Intercom, or null when omitted.
Current page size reported by Intercom, or null when omitted.
Total Intercom pages reported by the endpoint, or null when omitted.
Total Intercom record count reported by the endpoint, or null when omitted.

actions.name: list_companies
actions.description: List Intercom companies with pagination.
requiredScopes: Read and list users and companies

page.description: One-based Intercom page number to fetch.

perPage.description: Maximum number of Intercom records to return.

order.description: Order in which Intercom should return companies.

startingAfter.description: Opaque Intercom cursor returned from a previous paginated response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Intercom companies.

companies.description: Intercom companies returned for the current page.

hasMore.description: Whether Intercom reported another page of results.

anyOf.description: Cursor for the next Intercom page, or null when there is no next page.
Current page number reported by Intercom, or null when omitted.
Current page size reported by Intercom, or null when omitted.
Total Intercom pages reported by the endpoint, or null when omitted.
Total Intercom record count reported by the endpoint, or null when omitted.

perPage.description: Maximum number of Intercom records to return.

startingAfter.description: Opaque Intercom cursor returned from a previous paginated response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Intercom contacts.

contacts.description: Intercom contacts returned for the current page.

hasMore.description: Whether Intercom reported another page of results.

anyOf.description: Cursor for the next Intercom page, or null when there is no next page.

actions.description: List Intercom conversations with cursor-based pagination.

actions.name: list_events
actions.description: List recent Intercom data events for one user or lead.

userId.description: User ID used to identify the Intercom user.

email.description: Email address used to identify the Intercom user.

summary.description: Whether Intercom should return event summary data.

perPage.description: Maximum number of Intercom records to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading Intercom user data events. Exactly one of userId, email, or intercomUserId is required.

events.description: Intercom events returned by the endpoint.

actions.name: list_tags
actions.description: List all Intercom tags for the current workspace.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Intercom tags.

tags.description: Intercom tags returned for the workspace.

actions.name: reopen_conversation
actions.description: Reopen an Intercom conversation.

adminId.description: Intercom admin identifier performing the reopen.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reopening an Intercom conversation.

actions.name: reply_to_conversation
actions.description: Reply to an Intercom conversation as an admin.

conversationId.description: Intercom conversation identifier, or `last` to target the most recent part.

adminId.description: Intercom admin identifier sending the reply.

body.description: Reply body to send to the conversation.

messageType.description: Intercom reply type to create. Defaults to `comment`.

items.description: Public attachment URL to include in the reply.

attachmentUrls.description: Attachment URLs to include with the reply.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for replying to an Intercom conversation as an admin.
